What it does: Loads your text file into a Pandas "DataFrame" (a 2D table, usually named df).
Creates a smaller table keeping only the rows that match your condition.
Adds up all the numbers in a specific column.
Smashes rows with the same Date together and adds up their numbers (perfect for daily totals).
Converts the Pandas table into a standard Python list of dictionaries so Jinja2 can read it easily.
Tells Jinja2 to look in your current folder for HTML templates.
Shoves your calculated Python data into the HTML placeholders.
